title: Archiving a dashboard (regardless of its contents)

posts.author: yossir.rousso (Yossi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. There seems to be only a ‘delete’ option for dashboards.
Say I would like to archive a dashboard, regardless of its connected boards.
Currently I can only delete it, which affects its recovering/restoring options. This means that in 30 days, it’s gone forever.
Is this in monday.com’s roadmap?
